rationale: The cited paper appears only in a grouped, end-of-paper citation (with Ordabayeva and Fernandes 2018) to note that other marketing studies examine political beliefs in consumer behavior. The citing paper does not use Han et al. (2019) to build its core hypotheses, operationalizations, or empirical design, nor does it engage its specific mechanisms or findings. This indicates a background positioning role rather than a meaningful directional dependence.
